nodes.name: Run now (manual)
nodes.notes: One-time backfill. Run manually; there is no schedule.

nodes.name: Firecrawl: Comptroller list
nodes.notes: Credential = Header Auth account (Firecrawl). Scrapes the two qualifying-data-center tables to markdown.

nodes.name: Gemini: extract + locate
nodes.notes: Credential = Google Gemini(PaLM) Api account. Infers city/county since the Comptroller tables have no location column.

nodes.name: Get existing facilities
nodes.notes: Credential = GitHub account. Used to dedupe against pins already on the map.

nodes.name: GitHub: base commit
nodes.notes: Gets the base tree SHA so the new tree only adds files (keeps everything else).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Backfill ' + $('Build backfill').first().json.placedCount + ' Comptroller-registered Texas data centers', tree: $json.sha, parents: [ $('GitHub: main SHA').first().json.object.sha ] }) }}

nodes.name: GitHub: create branch
nodes.notes: Continue on error: re-running the same day reuses the existing branch.

nodes.name: GitHub: open PR
nodes.notes: Continue on error: an existing PR for the branch shouldn't fail the run.

parameters.subject: =Comptroller backfill: {{ $('Build backfill').first().json.placedCount }} data centers ready to review
Comptroller backfill: nothing placeable
